notes:
I've designed a premium, Apple-inspired pricing and proof page.

### Key Design Decisions:
- **Design System:** Created the "Obsidian Grid" design system, focusing on a sharp monochrome aesthetic, generous spacing, and an architectural layout.
- **Visual Hierarchy:** Used high-contrast typography and a rigid grid to make information easy to scan and digest.
- **The "Glass" Highlight:** The Professional plan is subtly highlighted with a glass-like backdrop to draw the eye without breaking the calm, monochrome palette.
- **Proof & Trust:** Included a dedicated section for testimonials and partner logos, maintaining the same minimalist, authoritative style.

Would you like me to adjust any of the pricing tiers or add more detailed feature comparisons?
prompt: Design a pricing and proof page in an Apple-like direction. Use a sharp monochrome grid, generous spacing, very few accent colors, and one glass-like feature comparison lens to highlight the main plan. The result should feel premium, calm, and easy to scan.
suggestions: Make the primary CTA more prominent
Add a Frequently Asked Questions section
Try a dark mode version of this page
title: Pricing & Comparison
